title: Senior Revenue Manager at Air India

jsonLd.title: Senior Revenue Manager at Air India
jsonLd.description:
Air India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Revenue Manager to join our dynamic team in Jodhpur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Air India:
Air India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Food Safety

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Air India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
